---
title: "Code of conduct"
description: "UIAO community standards — rendered from the canonical CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md at the repo root."
categories: [meta]
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Canonical source
This page renders the canonical
[`CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
at the repository root.
:::

{{< include ../../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md >}}
